serverInfo.name: nova-agency-concierge
serverInfo.title: Nova Agency Concierge
serverInfo.description: Nova Agency's website concierge — answers questions about Nova's 48 marketing services, 5 pricing tiers, builds, onboarding, and connects visitors to the team. Grounded knowledge base of tier prices, services, and contact details.

transport.description: POST { messages:[{role,content}], lang:'en'|'ar' }. Returns a Server-Sent-Events stream of Llama 3.1 8B tokens.

tools.name: quote_tier
tools.description: Recommends and quotes one of Nova's 5 monthly tiers (Launch 1,200 / Spark 3,000 / Foundation 6,000 / Growth 14,000 / Scale 32,000 AED/mo) based on the visitor's described needs.

needs.description: Free-text description of what the visitor needs.

tools.name: quote_service
tools.description: Cites the exact AED price and short description for any of Nova's 48 individual services (33 monthly retainers + 15 one-time builds) from the grounded knowledge base.

tools.name: explain_offering
tools.description: Explains what Nova is, how it's structured across the 6 service categories, and what makes it different from generic marketing agencies.

topic.description: Optional — narrow the explanation to a specific category or theme.

tools.name: handoff_human
tools.description: Surfaces the founders' direct contact (WhatsApp +971 54 428 5018, hello@novaagency.me, /contact.html) when the visitor wants to start, or when the question is outside the knowledge base.

reason.description: Why the handoff is being suggested.
